_readme: Declarative spec for all AI-generated pixel art assets. Edit this file to add or update assets. Run 'npm run sprites:assemble' after raw frames are downloaded to build spritesheets. See scripts/assemble-sprites.mjs for the raw file naming convention.

directions._note: Humanoids/birds: generate 5 right-side directions only (S, SE, E, NE, N) and mirror the left side in code — saves ~37% animation credits vs full 8. Symmetric creatures (spider): 4 cardinal directions, no mirroring needed.

styleGuide.notes: Pixel art, top-down RPG. Muted earthy palette per world. No neon. Match Mystic Woods / Pixel Crawler Free Pack aesthetic.

palettes.earth: military greens, grays, rust orange, drab iron — post-apocalyptic industrial
palettes.spinolandet: deep purple, acid green, amber, bioluminescent teal — organic alien biology
palettes.vatten: jade green, teal, white, soft gold, bamboo brown — Asian fantasy water magic

_rawNamingConvention._doc: When downloading PixelLab output, save frames to public/assets/sprites/_raw/[asset-id]/ using these filename patterns:
_rawNamingConvention.characterBase: base_{direction}.png — static base sprite per direction (south/north/east/west)
_rawNamingConvention.tilesetSheet: tileset.png — the full tileset sheet as returned by PixelLab

characters.name: Wanderer NPC
characters._comment: Generic post-apocalyptic wanderer NPC. Used by HumanoidNPC base class for walk/interact testing. Idle + walk only — no combat animations.

pixellab.description: weary post-apocalyptic survivor, ragged patched civilian jacket over simple shirt, worn dusty boots, no weapons, slightly hunched posture, gaunt tired face, muted gray and brown earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: Character created at n_directions=8; only 5 right-side dirs animated. SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Tinkerer
characters._comment: Post-apocalyptic tinkerer hero. Melee bash (cross-punch) + pistol ranged (throw-object). Dash via running-slide. Character created at 8 directions but only 5 right-side directions animated; left side mirrored in code.

pixellab.description: post-apocalyptic tinkerer mechanic, leather apron with tool belt and pouches, welding goggles pushed up on forehead, mechanical bash gauntlet on left fist, makeshift bolt-action rifle slung over right shoulder, sturdy heavy work boots, scarred weathered face, military olive green and rust brown tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: Character created at n_directions=8 in PixelLab; only 5 right-side dirs animated. SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Mini Velcrid
characters._comment: Spider-like alien creature used as the base sprite for all spinolandet enemies. Tinted/scaled per enemy class. Has idle (all dirs), custom skitter-walk (all dirs), death (jerking convulsion), attack (lunge/mandible snap), hurt (recoil flinch).

pixellab.description: mini Velcrid alien spider creature, dark red carapace, multiple legs, top-down pixel art

animations.template: custom-move like a 8 legged spider or roach and skitter f
custom-rearing up on hind legs, the front two clawed legs lunge forward snapping mandibles then recoil back
custom-creature flinches and recoils backward, legs flailing outward then clamping tight

characters.name: Skald
characters._comment: Norse warrior hero. Currently a placeholder rectangle in CombatArenaScene.

pixellab.description: Norse warrior hero, one-handed sword in right hand, round wooden shield in left hand, leather armor with metal trim and rivets, scarred weathered face, short dark hair, determined expression, muted military green and brown tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW are mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Contaminated Spider
characters._comment: Wave 1 melee enemy. Small, fast, comes in groups. Quadruped body type — animation templates must be verified after create_character (check get_character for available templates).

pixellab.description: small mutant spider, 8 legs radiating from bloated round abdomen, rust-orange and dark brown carapace, glowing infected green eyes, jagged mandibles, contaminated post-apocalyptic creature, military earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG

characters._animNote: Quadruped dog template has no death animation. Death is handled in code (fade + scale to 0). Available templates: bark, fast-walk, idle, running-4-frames, running-6-frames, running-8-frames, sneaking, walk-4-frames, walk-6-frames, walk-8-frames

characters.name: Skag
characters._comment: Wave 2 ranged enemy. Small feral scavenger that hurls debris. Stays at distance, low HP.

pixellab.description: small gaunt feral scavenger, hunched posture, oversized head, hollow sunken eyes, ragged military surplus rags, clutches sharp metal debris ready to throw, rust and dirt-stained, post-apocalyptic earth tones
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW are mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Mutant Crow
characters._comment: Wave 3 flying enemy. Swoops in from outside combat zone, dives to attack, retreats. Humanoid rig — arm animations become wing flaps naturally.

pixellab.description: large mutant crow, wide black wings spread wide viewed from above, sharp curved talons, bloated infected red eyes, matted greasy feathers with rust-orange patches, predatory bird, post-apocalyptic contaminated, dark military tones
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW are mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Färgglad Kordorörn (from Loke Marzuki)
characters._note: Flying bird — requires mode:pro for base character AND all animations. Show total credit cost (20–40 gen/direction × 5 dirs × 6 animations) before queueing. All animations are custom.

pixellab.description: large soaring raptor viewed from high top-down, broad wingspan, earthy brown and ochre plumage with patches of acid green on wing coverts and deep russet on throat — colours slightly too vivid suggesting corruption, thick hooked beak, broad fanned tail, talons visible as small hooks below wingtips, post-apocalyptic northern European bird, high top-down pixel art RPG earth palette
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

animations.template: custom-large eagle in slow thermal soar, wings slightly tilted adjusting on updraft, wingtips flexing, head turning side to side
custom-broad-winged eagle in powered flapping flight, full wing-beat cycle, body rising and dipping with each stroke, talons trailing
custom-eagle stoop: wings fold tight against body in steep dive, talons extending forward, then wings snap open to brake and sweep upward
custom-eagle flinches mid-flight, one wing snapping back sharply, body rotating off-axis, then correcting with opposite wing
custom-eagle losing flight: one wing folding inward while other beats weakly, tight spiral descent, final splayed impact against ground
custom-eagle snapping head toward target, wings spreading wide in threat display, body tilting aggressively toward threat

characters.name: Loke
characters._comment: Tier-0 player character. 10-year-old scout boy from Mistheim. Ash blond hair, green warm hat, gloves, hiking clothing, backpack and binoculars. Attacks with a wooden Y-fork slingshot. 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code.

pixellab.description: 10-year-old boy scout, ash blond hair tucked under a warm green knit hat, small face with curious eyes, lightweight hiking jacket and pants in earthy green and brown, fingerless gloves, heavy-duty hiking boots, small backpack on back, binoculars hanging around neck, holds a wooden Y-fork slingshot ready to shoot, Scandinavian wilderness palette, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

animations.template: custom-pulling back a wooden Y-fork slingshot with both hands, releasing, recoiling

characters.name: Child (Human Agrarian)
characters._comment: Settlement child. Half-height silhouette, sky-blue tunic accent, energetic. Adds scene life. Signature = playful jumping (running-jump template).

pixellab.description: small human child, simple sky-blue tunic over linen shirt, bare feet or simple sandals, tousled hair, bright curious face, energetic forward-leaning posture, anime-fantasy aesthetic, clean linework, soft expressive face, natural-fibre clothing, low-saturation earthy palette with sky-blue accent, top-down pixel art RPG style

characters.name: Militia (Human Agrarian)
characters._comment: Tier-2 hamlet defender — farmer who doubles as militia. Forest-green sash + simple billhook (held overhead in walk/idle, lowered on jab). Per #307 guard/militia rule.

pixellab.description: human peasant militiaman, woollen padded tunic, forest-green sash diagonally across chest, leather bracers, simple billhook polearm held resting on shoulder, sturdy boots, watchful posture, anime-fantasy aesthetic, clean linework, soft expressive face, natural-fibre clothing, low-saturation earthy palette with forest-green accent, top-down pixel art RPG style

characters.name: Smith (Human Agrarian)
characters._comment: Settlement blacksmith. Burly silhouette, burnt-orange leather apron, hammer prop. Signature = anvil hammer swing (custom).

pixellab.description: broad-shouldered human blacksmith, bare arms, sleeveless wool undershirt, burnt-orange leather apron with hammer holster, heavy soot-stained boots, leather wrist guards, soot smudges on forearms, anime-fantasy aesthetic, clean linework, soft expressive face, natural-fibre clothing, low-saturation earthy palette with burnt-orange accent, top-down pixel art RPG style

animations.template: custom-blacksmith swinging a hammer down onto an anvil, full overhead arc, recoil at apex with small spark burst, return to ready stance

characters.name: Villager (Human Agrarian)
characters._comment: Generic Mistheim agrarian peasant. The workhorse NPC — most-spawned in any human-agrarian settlement. Neutral palette, no accent — defines the baseline silhouette other roles riff on.

pixellab.description: human peasant villager, simple wool tunic, leather belt, calf-high cloth-wrapped legs, sturdy worn boots, no headwear, calm steady posture, anime-fantasy aesthetic, clean linework, soft expressive face, natural-fibre clothing, low-saturation earthy palette, neutral browns and dust-greys, top-down pixel art RPG style

characters.name: Elder (Human Agrarian)
characters._comment: Settlement elder. Burgundy stole accent, aged wise face, seated authority figure. Signature = sit-idle with occasional head nod (custom animation).

pixellab.description: elderly human village elder, long muted tan wool robe, wide burgundy stole draped over shoulders, wrinkled wise face with kind eyes, white or grey hair, gnarled wooden walking staff, gentle dignified upright posture, anime-fantasy aesthetic, clean linework, soft expressive face, natural-fibre clothing, low-saturation earthy palette with burgundy accent, top-down pixel art RPG style

animations.template: custom-elder seated on a wooden stool, slow steady breathing, gentle occasional head nod downward then back up, hands resting on lap

characters.name: Hawk-Scout (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Low-rank military sentry. Tawny-feathered Hawk-clan Wildkin who staffs the watchtower and guard-post. Lean, alert, always scanning. Represents the under-represented Hawk clan (0.10 weight).

pixellab.description: tawny-feathered hawk beastkin scout, sharp amber eyes, hooked nose-beak, vestigial wing-feathers along forearms, lean wiry build, slightly crouched alert stance, light hide poncho with bone toggles, leg wraps, leather messenger satchel across chest, feathered crest on head, muted brown and tawny earth tones with amber accents, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Fox-Herbalist (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Skilled specialist healer. Pale cream-furred Fox-clan Wildkin who tends the spirit-shrine. Calm, knowledgeable, carries dried herbs. Second Fox-clan role alongside fox-trader.

pixellab.description: pale cream-furred fox beastkin herbalist, dark ear tips, slender bushy tail, calm upright posture, bark-cloth wrap dress with many small herb pouches sewn along hem, bone needle tucked in headfur, herb-stained fingertips, woven grass belt, simple hide sandals, soft muted cream and sage green earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Wolf-Highfang (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Ruler — the Highfang, chosen by the Great Clans council. Silver-grey Greymane wolf, political leader not a soldier. Imposing but unarmored. Found at clan-lodge or town-hall. Highest status NPC in the settlement.

pixellab.description: silver-grey wolf beastkin ruler, scarred muzzle, one notched ear, imposing tall posture, layered hide mantle draped over shoulders, carved antler gorget as authority symbol, claw-and-tooth necklace, war paint streaks on cheeks, no armor, simple hide trousers, sturdy boots, dignified commanding stance, muted silver-grey and dark brown earth tones with bone-white accents, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Boar-Smith (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Skilled tradesperson. Massive Stoneback boar-clan blacksmith who works the ger-smithy and armory. Second Boar-clan role alongside boar-farmer — craftsman vs laborer distinction.

pixellab.description: massive dark-bristled boar beastkin blacksmith, chipped tusks, soot-stained coarse fur, bare broad chest, heavy hide apron with burn marks, thick leather arm wraps to elbows, carries iron tongs in one hand, powerful stocky stance, wide shoulders, sturdy hide boots, muted dark brown and charcoal earth tones with soot-black accents, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

animations._pro_candidate: Template cross-punch may not read as hammering on boar body. Try template first; if bad, redo as custom/pro. Do last.

characters.name: Cat-Brewer (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Common tradesperson. Tabby-striped Cat-clan Wildkin who runs the brewery and tavern. Relaxed, slightly smirking. Gives the under-represented Cat clan (0.15 weight) a visible settlement role.

pixellab.description: tabby-striped cat beastkin brewer, large rounded ears, slit pupils, long curling tail, relaxed slightly smirking expression, stained linen tunic with rolled-up sleeves, leather belt with wooden ladle tucked in, simple cloth apron with brew stains, hide sandals, casual confident posture leaning slightly, muted warm brown and tan earth tones with amber-gold accents, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Snake-Lorekeeper (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Religious authority. Scaled Snake-clan Wildkin who tends the ancestor-stone and temple. Rarest clan (0.05 weight) but memorable presence — quiet, still, slightly unsettling. Carries a coiled scroll case.

pixellab.description: scaled snake beastkin lorekeeper, muted green-brown scales, lidless slit-pupiled eyes, smooth hairless head, long sinuous neck, layered dark bark-cloth robes with burnt glyph patterns, coiled scroll case strapped to back, thin clawed hands, very still upright posture, slightly unsettling calm expression, muted dark green and brown earth tones with ochre glyph accents, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

animations._pro_candidate: Template fireball may look wrong on snake body with robes. Try template first; if bad, redo as custom/pro. Do last.

characters.name: Wolf-Pup (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Arctic wolf child. White fluffy fur, bright blue eyes, oversized vest. Energetic troublemaker running through the settlement. Species variety: arctic wolf (vs grey wolf adults).

pixellab.description: young arctic wolf beastkin child, white fluffy fur, bright blue eyes, small pointed ears, oversized hide vest hanging past knees, bare pawed feet, energetic forward-leaning stance like chasing something, small bushy tail, muted white and pale grey with ice-blue accents, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Bear-Cub (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Panda bear child. Black-and-white fur, chubby, shy, clutching honey-cake. Species variety: panda (vs brown bear elder adult).

pixellab.description: young panda beastkin child, black and white fur with distinctive eye patches, round chubby face, small rounded ears, simple wrap tunic, clutching a small honey-cake in one hand, shy slightly hunched posture, stubby legs, muted black and white with warm brown tunic, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Fox-Kit (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Fennec fox child. Comically huge ears, sandy fur, tiny body, curious eavesdropper. Species variety: fennec (vs red fox trader and cream fox herbalist adults).

pixellab.description: young fennec fox beastkin child, sandy pale fur, comically huge oversized pointed ears almost as tall as head, enormous dark eyes, tiny body, ragged little hide poncho, barefoot with small pawed feet, curious crouched forward posture, fluffy tail, muted sandy tan and cream earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Rabbit-Leveret (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Jackrabbit child. Long gangly ears, oversized hind feet, fastest kid in the village. Species variety: jackrabbit (vs cottontail commoner adult).

pixellab.description: young jackrabbit beastkin child, brown fur, very long gangly upright ears, oversized powerful hind feet, lanky limbs, simple linen shift dress, mid-hop posture with one foot raised, bright alert eyes, small cotton tail, muted warm brown and tan earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Cat-Kitten (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Calico cat child. Patchy fur, tiny apron imitating the brewer parent, carries wooden cup. Wannabe grown-up. Species variety: calico (vs tabby brewer adult).

pixellab.description: young calico cat beastkin child, patchy orange white and black fur, big round curious eyes, rounded ears, tiny cloth apron over simple tunic imitating a grown-up brewer, carries a small wooden cup in both hands, eager upright posture, curling tail, muted orange white and warm brown earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Boar-Piglet (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Warthog child. Tiny tusks, muddy knees, no shirt, scrappy mud-roller. Species variety: warthog (vs wild boar farmer/smith adults).

pixellab.description: young warthog beastkin child, coarse dark bristly fur, tiny tusks just poking from lower jaw, wide flat nose, muddy knees, rough-spun shorts only no shirt, scrappy energetic stance, small beady eyes, wiry mane on head, muted dark brown and mud-tan earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Rabbit-Barmaid (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Arctic hare barmaid who serves at the tavern and inn. Quick, bustling, carries a tray. Species variety: arctic hare (vs cottontail commoner and jackrabbit leveret).

pixellab.description: arctic hare beastkin barmaid, white fur, long upright ears, pink inner ears, simple linen dress with hide apron, carrying a wooden tray with mugs, quick bustling posture leaning forward, muted white and warm brown earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Bear-Stablehand (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Sun bear stablehand who tends the stables. Hay-stained, carries a bucket. Species variety: sun bear (vs brown bear elder and panda cub).

pixellab.description: sun bear beastkin stablehand, small dark brown fur with pale chest patch, rounded ears, stocky build, simple hide vest over bare arms, hay stuck in fur, carries a wooden bucket in one hand, sturdy working posture, muted dark brown and straw-yellow earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Boar-Woodcutter (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Peccary boar woodcutter who works the sawmill. Axe on shoulder, sawdust-covered. Species variety: peccary (vs wild boar farmer, warthog piglet).

pixellab.description: peccary boar beastkin woodcutter, grey-brown coarse bristled fur, small tusks, compact stocky build, sleeveless hide tunic, leather arm wraps, woodcutting axe resting on shoulder, sawdust on arms, strong stance, muted grey-brown and bark-brown earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Mixed-Porter (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Mixed-clan market porter who hauls goods between market-hall and warehouse. Chimera features from wolf + fox heritage. First mixed-clan (0.10 weight) representative.

pixellab.description: mixed clan beastkin market porter, patchy mismatched fur with wolf grey and fox red patches, one rounded ear one pointed ear, broad shoulders, simple rough tunic, carries a large burlap sack over shoulder, strong working posture, muted grey and rust-brown earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Cat-Sweeper (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Grey-striped cat groundskeeper who sweeps paths and keeps the village tidy. Fussy, detail-oriented. Species variety: grey tabby (vs tabby brewer, calico kitten).

pixellab.description: cat beastkin sweeper groundskeeper, grey and white striped fur, tall pointed ears, slim build, simple linen tunic, holds a straw broom in both hands, fussy upright posture, long tail curled neatly, muted grey and cream earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Wolf-Cook (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Brown wolf cookfire tender who works the campfire and longhouse kitchen. Warm, friendly. Species variety: brown/timber wolf (vs grey wolf warrior, silver highfang, arctic pup).

pixellab.description: wolf beastkin cookfire tender, brown wolf fur, apron over simple tunic, holds a large wooden ladle, standing near implied cooking, warm friendly expression, sturdy build, muted brown and warm orange earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Rabbit-Runner (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Young rabbit messenger runner between watchtower and town-hall. Fast, lean, ears swept back. Species variety: standard brown rabbit (distinct from white arctic hare barmaid, cottontail commoner, jackrabbit leveret).

pixellab.description: young rabbit beastkin messenger runner, tan brown fur, very long ears swept back from speed, lean athletic build, light hide vest, leg wraps for running, small message pouch on hip, mid-stride forward-leaning posture, muted tan and brown earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Boar-Granary (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Service staff. Boar granary worker who hauls grain sacks at the granary, root-cellar, and barn. Stocky, strong. Species variety: standard dark boar (distinct from peccary woodcutter, warthog piglet).

pixellab.description: boar beastkin granary worker, dark brown bristled fur, broad stocky build, heavy hide apron, thick arms, carries a grain sack under one arm, sturdy wide stance, muted dark brown and wheat-tan earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG style
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters.name: Fox-Barmaid (Ikibeki)
characters._comment: Variant barmaid. Red fox species (vs arctic hare barmaid). Tavern/inn service staff.

pixellab.description: red fox beastkin barmaid, orange-red fur, white chest, bushy tail, pointed ears, linen dress with hide apron, carrying wooden tray with mugs, quick bustling posture, muted orange and warm brown earth tones, top-down pixel art RPG
pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

pixellab._n_directions_note: 5 right-side directions; SW/W/NW mirrored in code via sprite.setFlipX(true)

characters._comment: Variant stablehand. Grizzly bear species (vs sun bear stablehand).

tilesets.name: Animated Water Tiles
tilesets._comment: 4-frame animated water spritesheet for the procedural terrain. Replaces the Mystic Woods water-sheet.png. Generated via create_tiles_pro to match plains.png style.

pixellab.description: 1). calm still water, smooth deep blue surface 2). gentle water ripple, blue-teal with subtle small diagonal wave pattern 3). water mid-ripple, teal-blue with visible wave crests 4). full water ripple, active blue water with white foam highlights and wave peaks
pixellab._style_notes: Match plains.png style: top-down, 16x16, basic shading, selective outline, muted blues/teals

tilesets.name: Earth Arena Floor
tilesets._comment: Stone floor for the Earth third of the combat arena. Dark, battle-worn, ancient.

pixellab.lower_description: dark cracked stone floor, ancient fortress flagstone, worn and battle-scarred
pixellab.upper_description: smooth dark stone slab, old fortress floor, dimly lit
pixellab.transition_description: cracked stone edges, grit and dust between slabs

tilesets.name: Spinolandet Arena Floor
tilesets._comment: Chitinous shell-plate floor for the Spinolandet third of the arena.

pixellab.lower_description: dark organic chitinous floor, segmented insect shell plates, alien biology
pixellab.upper_description: smooth amber chitin shell plate, bioluminescent veins glowing faintly teal
pixellab.transition_description: cracked chitin edges, organic fluid between plates

tilesets.name: Mistheim Arena Floor
tilesets._comment: Jade tile floor for the Mistheim third of the arena.

pixellab.lower_description: dark mossy stone floor, ancient water temple, wet patches
pixellab.upper_description: smooth jade tile floor, Asian temple, carved geometric patterns, faint gold trim
pixellab.transition_description: water-worn stone edges, moss and mineral deposits

tilesets.name: Dungeon Wall Top Face
tilesets._comment: Top face of dungeon stone wall. 16×16. Matches arena_floor_earth palette — dark stone, muted warm earth tones.

pixellab.description: 1). dark ancient fortress stone wall top face, rough hewn stone blocks seen from above, weathered gray and dark brown stone, cracked mortar seams, battle-scarred, muted earth tones, post-apocalyptic dungeon

tilesets.name: Dungeon Wall Side Face
tilesets._comment: Side (front) face of dungeon stone wall. 16×16. Matches arena_floor_earth palette. Same stone as dungeon_wall_top, different angle.

pixellab.description: 1). dark ancient fortress stone wall front face, vertical rough-hewn gray stone blocks with horizontal mortar seams, weathered and chipped, muted dark gray and warm brown earth tones, post-apocalyptic dungeon

tilesets.name: Dungeon Doorway / Arch
tilesets._comment: Stone arch doorway tile. 16×16. Dark opening framed by worn stone arch. Earth palette matching dungeon walls.

pixellab.description: 1). ancient fortress stone arch doorway, worn rough-hewn stone arch frame with dark void opening, cracked mortar, muted dark gray and warm brown earth tones, top-down dungeon tile

tilesets.name: Dungeon Torch (Animated)
tilesets._comment: Animated wall torch, 3-frame flicker. Output is a 48×16 strip (3 × 16px frames). Phaser loads as spritesheet with frameWidth:16. Earth palette — iron bracket, warm amber flame, dark stone wall bg.

pixellab.description: 1). iron wall torch bracket, dim red ember, dark stone wall background, minimal warm glow, muted earth tones 2). iron wall torch with medium orange flame, warm amber light on dark stone 3). iron wall torch with bright orange-yellow flame flicker, strong warm glow, dark stone dungeon wall

tilesets.name: Dirt Road Tiles (Autotile 16)
tilesets._comment: 16-tile autotile set for dirt roads. 4-bit bitmask (N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8). Frame order: 0=isolated, 1=N-S straight, 2=E-W straight, 3=SE corner, 4=SW corner, 5=NE corner, 6=NW corner, 7=T no-N, 8=T no-S, 9=T no-E, 10=T no-W, 11=crossroad, 12=dead-N, 13=dead-E, 14=dead-S, 15=dead-W.

pixellab.description: worn dirt road autotile set, packed brown earth with wheel ruts, 16 isometric variants for bitmask autotiling

tilesets.name: Paved Road Tiles (Autotile 16)
tilesets._comment: 16-tile autotile set for old stone paved roads. Same bitmask layout as road_dirt.

pixellab.description: old stone paved road autotile set, weathered grey cobblestone, 16 isometric variants for bitmask autotiling

tilesets.name: Forest Path Tiles (Autotile 16)
tilesets._comment: 16-tile autotile set for narrow mossy forest paths. Same bitmask layout as road_dirt.

pixellab.description: narrow forest path autotile set, dark green mossy dirt trail, 16 isometric variants for bitmask autotiling

tilesets.name: Animal Trail Tiles (Autotile 16)
tilesets._comment: 16-tile autotile set for thin beaten animal trails. Same bitmask layout as road_dirt.

pixellab.description: animal trail autotile set, narrow beaten tan earth through wild grass, 16 isometric variants for bitmask autotiling

mapObjects._note: Ikibeki building material tier variants. Generated via create_map_object. Each produces one PNG. Style-match against existing buildings in public/assets/packs/building-objects/ikibeki/. Use background_image with path to an existing building for style consistency.
mapObjects._tiers: hide-tent (nomadic, raw hide over bone frames, yurt-like), burrow-den (hobbit-like mounded earth, round doors, grass roofs, suited to bear/boar clans), stone-masonry (fitted stone walls, hide-and-timber roofs, carved lintels, mature settlement)
